name: deconstruct-toolkit
description: Reverse-engineer polished artifacts (copy/docs/UI/arguments/orgs) into their blueprints, in EN/JA/ZH.

interface.shortDescription: Reverse-engineer polished artifacts into reusable blueprints (EN / JA / ZH)
interface.longDescription: Use deconstruct-toolkit to take apart a polished artifact — marketing copy, docs, UI, an argument, or an org design — into the structure, moves, and hidden assumptions that make it work. artifact-deconstruct extracts a reusable blueprint, argument-deconstruct maps a piece's claims and rhetorical structure, and assumption-surface exposes the unstated premises. Works in English, Japanese, and Chinese.
defaultPrompt: Deconstruct this landing page into its blueprint.
Break down the argument in this essay.
Surface the hidden assumptions in this proposal.
